For Organizations

Your teams are spending 60% of their day
on coordination. Not work.

The coordination tax — email, follow-ups, status checks, waiting — is the single largest productivity drain in most organizations. Agent-to-agent AI can eliminate it. The Coworker Framework shows you exactly where to start.

The Problem

Organizations are at the cusp of AI adoption. Most don't know where to start.

Most organizations have subscribed to AI tools. Some have engaged advisors. Built pilots. Attended briefings. The coordination tax is unchanged.

Cross-functional teams spend 60% of their day managing handoffs — not doing the work they were hired to do. Email threads. Status checks. Waiting for someone to respond. Following up on a document. This isn't a people problem. It's a structural one. And most AI strategies don't address the right layer.

Agent-to-agent AI systems can eliminate the coordination layer entirely. But only if you know where to deploy them.
1%
of business leaders say their AI strategy is "mature."
McKinsey, 2025
95%
of enterprise AI pilots fail to generate measurable business impact.
MIT / Fortune, 2025
60%
of the workday consumed by coordination, not core work.
Industry average, cross-functional workflows
The Coworker Framework

Where do we start?

Cross-functional teams spend 60% of their day on coordination — not strategy, not delivery. Email, follow-ups, status checks, waiting. The work of managing handoffs between people.

The Coworker Framework maps where that coordination tax lives in your organization and shows leaders exactly where agent-to-agent AI can eliminate it.

Every engagement starts here. Book a free 20-minute discovery call to walk through it.

Engagement Model

How it works.

01
Discovery call — always first
Free · 20 minutes · No pitch, no deck. We listen to your situation and tell you honestly whether and how we can help.
02
Framework assessment
We map your highest-coordination workflows using the Coworker Framework — identifying exactly where agent-to-agent AI creates the most leverage.
03
Choose your engagement
Based on where you are, you select the engagement that fits — from a focused use-case consultation to a full organizational AI blueprint.
Engagements

Four ways to work with us.

Always First
Discovery Call
Free
20 minutes

No pitch. No deck. We listen to your situation and tell you honestly whether and how we can help. Every engagement starts here.

Focused
AI Use Case Consultation
$500
2 hours

A focused session to identify and map AI use cases relevant to your organization and industry. Walk away with a prioritized list of where to start — before deploying any AI tool or process.

Recommended
Blueprint for First Coworker

Fixed scope

Full workflow mapping using the Coworker Framework. We identify your highest-impact coordination workflow, design the agent-to-agent architecture, and deliver a blueprint your team or a dev shop can execute.

Scoped engagement

Full AI transformation strategy for your organization. Maps all high-coordination workflows, prioritizes the AI adoption roadmap, and delivers an architecture plan for the full build.
